creator: bortzy@riseup.net
text:
Thanks Chris.

I successfully installed lxterminal 0.4.0 from the port.
I'll test it now and give you my feedback soon.
Please note I haven't hit the paste bug for awhile. Maybe is it related to X or anything else?

Will you make lxterminal 0.4.0 available for pkg?
Cyril.
